sections.paragraph:
ῥαντίζω [ῥαίνω] ‘apply a liquid or other substance in a dispersing manner’

—a. spatter, sprinkle Rv 19:13 v.l. of a bloodied garment

—b. sprinkle Hb 9:13, 19, 21 of cultic rite of purification, w. focus on scattering of drops or particles; in imagery 10:22.

—c. mid. cleanse/wash oneself Mk 7:4 v.l. of personal cultic purification.
